title: thelypteris quadriaurita
intro: Thelypteris quadriaurita, also known as Four-veined Fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Thelypteris quadriaurita include reducing fever, relieving rheumatism and arthritis, and supporting respiratory health. Thelypteris quadriaurita can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in folk medicine to treat various ailments.
